# Achievement Hub

> Achievement Hub is a Steam achievement-tracking application that lets users connect a public Steam account, synchronize owned games, view achievement progress, monitor completion statistics, and compare their progress with other registered users.

## Public pages

- [Home](https://achievementhub.org/): Overview of Achievement Hub and its Steam achievement-tracking features.
- [About](https://achievementhub.org/about): Information about the project and its purpose.
- [Connect Steam](https://achievementhub.org/connect-steam): Instructions for connecting a public Steam account.
- [Help Center](https://achievementhub.org/help): Help with accounts, Steam profiles, synchronization, and achievements.
- [Contact](https://achievementhub.org/contact): Contact form for questions and support.
- [Privacy Policy](https://achievementhub.org/privacy): Information about data collection and use.
- [Terms of Use](https://achievementhub.org/terms): Terms and conditions for using Achievement Hub.
- [Log In](https://achievementhub.org/login): Sign in to an Achievement Hub account.
- [Register](https://achievementhub.org/register): Create an Achievement Hub account.

## Authenticated features

The following areas require an Achievement Hub account and are not intended as public documentation pages:

- Dashboard
- Profile management
- My Games
- Achievement progress
- Community leaderboard
- Individual game achievement pages

## Core features

- Achievement Hub account registration and JWT-based authentication
- Connection to a public Steam profile using a Steam ID
- Steam library synchronization
- Owned-game and playtime display
- Achievement status and unlock-date tracking
- Game completion percentages
- User profiles and achievement statistics
- Registered-user leaderboard

## Steam data

Achievement Hub uses the Steam Web API to retrieve publicly available information, which may include:

- Steam display name and avatar
- Public Steam profile URL
- Owned games
- Game playtime
- Achievement names and descriptions
- Locked and unlocked achievement states
- Achievement unlock dates

Steam passwords are never requested or stored. Steam profile and game-detail visibility must be public for synchronization to work. Some games do not expose achievement information through the Steam Web API.

## Technology

Achievement Hub uses the MERN stack:

- MongoDB and Mongoose
- Express
- React with Vite
- Node.js
- JSON Web Token authentication

## Data ownership and affiliation

Steam, Steam Community, game names, artwork, and achievement information belong to Valve Corporation and their respective publishers. Achievement Hub is an independent project and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Valve Corporation.

## Additional links

- [Steam](https://store.steampowered.com/)
- [Steam Community](https://steamcommunity.com/)
